overview.text: VRA Rescue NSW is a volunteer general land-rescue service accredited by the State Rescue Board. Squads provide road-crash rescue, vertical rescue, swift-water and flood rescue, and general assistance to NSW Police, NSW Ambulance and other emergency services.

items: Around 30 squads spread across regional NSW.
Primary or secondary RCR (Road Crash Rescue) authority in many regional areas where there is no FRNSW or career RFS rescue capability.
Tasked through NSW Police VKG and dispatched with paramedics and fire on shared incident talkgroups.
